entity.label: Michah
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: The first in rank of the priests of the family of Kohathites (1 Chr. 23:20).

nodes.label: Michah
nodes.description: The first in rank of the priests of the family of Kohathites (1 Chr. 23:20).

nodes.label: Uzziel
nodes.description: One of the sons of Kohath, and uncle of Aaron (Ex. 6:18; Lev. 10:4).

nodes.label: Shamir
nodes.description: One of the sons of Michah (1 Chr. 24:24).

nodes.label: Mishael
nodes.description: A Levite; the eldest of the three sons of Uzziel (Ex. 6:22).

nodes.label: Zithri
nodes.description: The Lord protects, a Levite, son of Uzziel (Ex. 6:22).

verses.text: Of the sons of Uzziel; Michah the first, and Jesiah the second.
Of the sons of Uzziel; Michah: of the sons of Michah; Shamir.
The brother of Michah was Isshiah: of the sons of Isshiah; Zechariah.
